user.title: Warm Welcome
user.description: Predicts when your floor heating must start so each room is warm when you return from vacation. Pick the entities shared by all rooms; afterwards, add each room via 'Add room' on the integration page.

data_description.end_date_entity: Entity holding the date and time your vacation ends (your arrival). Must be an input_datetime with time enabled or a datetime entity.
data_description.floor_warmup_hours: How long the heating warms the floor's thermal mass before the floor emits heat into the room — often 2-3 hours for floor heating. Every room starts this much earlier.

data_description.end_date_entity: Entity holding the date and time your vacation ends (your arrival). Must be an input_datetime with time enabled or a datetime entity.
data_description.floor_warmup_hours: How long the heating warms the floor's thermal mass before the floor emits heat into the room — often 2-3 hours for floor heating. Every room starts this much earlier.

data_description.climate_entity: The thermostat of the room to pre-heat.
The thermostat of the room to pre-heat.

data_description.heat_rates: The maximal heat rates known for the room: one point per measurement — at which outdoor temperature the room gained at most how many degrees in how many hours. The gain may be negative if the heating cannot keep up at that outdoor temperature. Values between the points are interpolated linearly.
data_description.set_preset: Switch the climate entity to the selected preset when the calculated start time is reached.
data_description.target_preset: The climate entity's presets are listed; only used when 'Set preset at heating start' is enabled.
data_description.preset_temperatures: Optional. Only used for the computation: tells the predictor which set temperature each preset will try to reach — nothing from this map is ever sent to the climate entity. When 'Set temperature at heating start' is enabled, the target temperature below overrides it as the prediction target.
data_description.set_temperature: Send the target temperature to the climate entity when the calculated start time is reached.
data_description.target_temperature: Room temperature to reach by the time you arrive. Sent to the climate entity as its target temperature at the heating start, overriding whatever setpoint the selected preset applies.

error.invalid_heat_rates: Each heat rate point needs an outdoor temperature, a temperature gain, and a positive duration. Outdoor temperatures must be unique and at least one point must have a positive gain.
error.invalid_preset_temperatures: Each preset temperature needs a preset name and a temperature; presets must be unique.
error.no_action: Enable at least one action to perform at the heating start.
error.target_preset_required: Select a preset when 'Set preset at heating start' is enabled.
